since_last: 53% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +2.19%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 53% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.56% · BTC +0.53% · Gold +0.19% · Nasdaq100 +0.42%. 53% of 100 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +2.19%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +2.19%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -1.81%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +27.47%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +27.47%, BABA +6.02%, POWL +4.81%, VST +4.39%, GOOGL +4.23%. Laggards: IBM -25.85%, DELL -12.05%, CSCO -5.56%, ANET -4.99%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.09% at $136.2
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.09% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
